emails.subject: Re: 12/4/00 Checkout
emails.body: Re: 12/4/00 Checkout The first deal is no good Bob checked it out with Smitty at Prebon. The second two were Tim Belden deals. Following are the numbers: 473320 sells El Paso 25 MW 170.00 Mid-C Q2-01 473321 sells Grant County 25 MW 175.00 Mid-C Q2-01 Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 12/04/2000 02:31 PM
